series_metadata.series_description: Civil Rights plans documenting compliance with affirmative action/EEO requirements for 88 counties and 44+ Children's Service Boards. Also, includes county Child Protection and Oversight Reports showing compliance status.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office and 4 years in records center, Review by State Archives prior disposition. ; Electronic: in office 6 years. Review by State Archives prior disposition
